final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed technical infographic of a Sony A7 camera, fully exploded/disassembled view with all parts labeled by name.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration, exploded-view diagram in the style of a precision engineering manual, flat vector with subtle depth shading
Composition: centered exploded-view layout, isometric or slightly angled perspective, each component spatially separated with leader lines pointing to labels
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera fully disassembled into all individual parts — body shell, sensor unit, shutter mechanism, mirror box, battery compartment, card slot, lens mount, buttons, dials, circuit boards, cables, screws, grip rubber, viewfinder module, LCD screen assembly — each part labeled with its official name in English
Scene/backdrop: clean white or very light gray background, no environment
Lighting/mood: flat, even diffused light, no harsh shadows, technical clarity over atmosphere
Color palette: neutral gray and black for camera parts, white background, accent color (blue or red) for leader lines and label text
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: all part labels must be legible; leader lines must clearly connect each label to its corresponding component; layout must not overlap parts or text
Avoid: photorealistic rendering that obscures part boundaries, decorative backgrounds, missing labels, overlapping text, generic camera silhouette without detail
